name: Find Skills
description: Discover and manage skills for Prismer.AI workspace. Search, install, and uninstall skills that extend workspace capabilities.
author: Prismer Team

tools.name: skill_search
tools.description: Search for skills by name, description, or capability

category.description: Filter by category (latex, jupyter, pdf, citation, data, writing, general)

tools.name: skill_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific skill

tools.name: skill_install
tools.description: Install a skill to the current workspace

skillId.description: The skill ID or package name

tools.name: skill_list
tools.description: List all skills installed in the current workspace

tools.name: skill_uninstall
tools.description: Remove a skill from the current workspace

tools.name: skill_update
tools.description: Update installed skills to their latest versions

skillId.description: Specific skill to update (omit for all)
